meaning: n.闂叉暎,鎳掓儼,璧嬮棽鏃犱簨
examples: Braccio was a hater of idleness.
After a period of enforced idleness, she found a new job.
I've often heard and read that idleness is a very great evil.
The real theme is the undermining of male self-confidence brought about by long-term idleness.
The rest of us will be painting those picket fences in lieu of idleness.
